allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\qli\\Desktop\\IT\\2605_SpringShow\\topo_json\\large_rome.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "vertices count: $\($json.vertices.Count\)"; "tiles count: $\($json.tiles.Count\)"; "first tile keys:"; $json.tiles[0].PSObject.Properties.Name; "first tile sample:"; $json.tiles[0] | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4)

PowerShell($json = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\qli\\Desktop\\IT\\2605_SpringShow\\topo_json\\large_rome.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "elev range:"; \($json.vertices | Measure-Object -Property elevation -Min -Max | Select Minimum,Maximum\); "hex x range:"; \($json.vertices.hexCoords | Measure-Object -Property x -Min -Max | Select Minimum,Maximum\); "hex y range:"; \($json.vertices.hexCoords | Measure-Object -Property y -Min -Max | Select Minimum,Maximum\); "tile vertexIndices length distribution:"; \($json.tiles | Group-Object {$_.vertexIndices.Count} | Select Name,Count\))

PowerShell($json = Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\qli\\Desktop\\IT\\2605_SpringShow\\topo_json\\large_rome.json' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $emin = \($json.vertices | Measure-Object -Property elevation -Min\).Minimum; $emax = \($json.vertices | Measure-Object -Property elevation -Max\).Maximum; "elev min/max: $emin / $emax"; $xs = $json.vertices | ForEach-Object { $_.hexCoords.x }; $ys = $json.vertices | ForEach-Object { $_.hexCoords.y }; $xmin = \($xs | Measure-Object -Min\).Minimum; $xmax = \($xs | Measure-Object -Max\).Maximum; $ymin = \($ys | Measure-Object -Min\).Minimum; $ymax = \($ys | Measure-Object -Max\).Maximum; "x: $xmin / $xmax  y: $ymin / $ymax"; $sizes = $json.tiles | ForEach-Object { $_.vertexIndices.Count } | Group-Object; $sizes | Format-Table Name,Count)
